overall.description: A cinematic scene from a Batman video game showing the character perched on a Gotham City rooftop at night, overlooking the illuminated Bat-Signal projected against the cloudy sky. The gothic architecture of the city is visible with towering art deco buildings and an industrial structure with red warning lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic rooftop overlook with gargoyle perch

events.description: camera slowly pans right to reveal more of the industrial tower structure
camera pans back left to center on the Bat-Signal again

agents.ego_description: Batman stands motionless on a stone gargoyle perch, cape draped behind him, gazing at the Bat-Signal illuminating the night sky over Gotham City

entered.detail: Bright white searchlight beam projecting the bat symbol into the cloudy night sky
Tall industrial structure with red warning lights and metal framework
Cluster of illuminated art deco skyscrapers with glowing windows
Suspension bridge cables visible in the distant background
Stone gargoyle statue on building ledge serving as Batman's vantage point

segments.scene_description: Batman stands perched on a gargoyle overlooking Gotham City at night, with the iconic Bat-Signal glowing in the center of the sky. The camera slowly pans right to reveal a large industrial tower with red lights, then returns to center. The city skyline features gothic art deco architecture with illuminated windows against the dark cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping camera movement that begins with a focused view of a lone figure and expands to reveal the brooding scale of Gotham City. It begins with Batman perched atop a stone gargoyle, framed against a dark, cloudy sky where the iconic Bat-Signal glows intensely. As the camera slowly pans to the right, the view shifts from the central signal to a towering industrial structure punctuated by flashing red warning lights. The perspective then returns to the center, opening up to showcase the vast skyline of gothic art deco architecture with illuminated windows flickering across the cityscape.
